name: Month Wise Sales
query:
SELECT
    YEAR(daily_report.`Date`) AS "YEAR",
    MONTHNAME(daily_report.`Date`) AS "MONTH",
    ROUND(SUM(daily_report.`Item Total`), 2) AS "Item Total",
    ROUND(SUM(daily_report.`Total Taxes and Charges`), 2) AS "Total Taxes and Charges",
    ROUND(SUM(daily_report.`Grand Total`), 2) AS "Grand Total"
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            date_list.`date` AS "Date",
            ROUND(SUM(b.`net_total`), 2) AS "Item Total",
            ROUND(SUM(b.`total_taxes_and_charges`), 2) AS "Total Taxes and Charges",
            ROUND(SUM(b.`grand_total`), 2) AS "Grand Total"
        FROM 
            (
                /* Note the doubled %% here for Frappe/Python compatibility */
                SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%%Y-%%m-01'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH) AS `date`
                UNION
                SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%%Y-%%m-01'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH), INTERVAL n DAY) AS `date`
                FROM (
                    SELECT a.N + b.N * 10 + c.N * 100 + 1 AS n
                    FROM (
                        SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9
                    ) AS a
                    CROSS JOIN (
                        SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9
                    ) AS b
                    CROSS JOIN (
                        SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9
                    ) AS c
                    ORDER BY n
                ) AS nums
                WHERE DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%%Y-%%m-01'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH), INTERVAL n DAY) <= CURDATE()
            ) AS date_list

        /* Unified Source Table */
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT branch, status, docstatus, posting_date, posting_time, net_total, total_taxes_and_charges, grand_total
            FROM `tabPOS Invoice`
            WHERE %(invoice_type)s = 'POS Invoice'

            UNION ALL

            SELECT branch, status, docstatus, posting_date, posting_time, net_total, total_taxes_and_charges, grand_total
            FROM `tabSales Invoice`
            WHERE %(invoice_type)s = 'Sales Invoice'
              AND is_pos = 1 
              AND is_created_using_pos = 1
        ) b ON 1=1

        LEFT JOIN `tabURY Report Settings` rs ON (
            rs.`branch` = %(branch)s
        )
        WHERE
            b.`branch` = %(branch)s
            AND b.`status` IN ("Consolidated", "Paid", "Completed") 
            AND b.`docstatus` = 1 
            AND (
                ((rs.`hours` IS NULL OR rs.`hours` = 0) AND b.`posting_date` = date_list.`date`)
                OR (rs.`hours` > 0 
                    AND TIMESTAMP(b.`posting_date`, b.`posting_time`) <= TIMESTAMP(DATE_ADD(date_list.`date`, INTERVAL 1 DAY), CONCAT(LPAD(rs.`hours`, 2, '0'), ':00:00')) 
                    AND TIMESTAMP(b.`posting_date`, b.`posting_time`) >= TIMESTAMP(date_list.`date`, CONCAT(LPAD(rs.`hours`, 2, '0'), ':00:00'))
                )
                OR (rs.`branch` IS NULL AND b.`posting_date` = date_list.`date`)
            )
        GROUP BY 
            date_list.`date`
    ) AS daily_report
GROUP BY
    YEAR(daily_report.`Date`),
    MONTH(daily_report.`Date`)
ORDER BY
    YEAR(daily_report.`Date`) DESC,
    MONTH(daily_report.`Date`) DESC;
